recipe.title: A cracking burger
recipe.description: This is our best beef burger recipe! It shows you how to make your own burger patties from scratch, with a secret ingredient. Add your favourite toppings.

steps.descr: Wrap the crackers in a tea towel and smash up until...
steps.instructions: Wrap the crackers in a tea towel and smash up until fine, breaking up any big bits with your hands, then tip into a large bowl.

on_enter.say: Wrap the crackers in a tea towel and smash up until fine, breaking up any big bits with your hands, then tip into a large bowl.

steps.descr: Finely chop the parsley (stalks and all), then add to...
steps.instructions: Finely chop the parsley (stalks and all), then add to the bowl with the mustard (if using), and the minced beef.

on_enter.say: Finely chop the parsley (stalks and all), then add to the bowl with the mustard (if using), and the minced beef.

steps.descr: Crack the egg into the bowl, then add a good pinch of...
steps.instructions: Crack the egg into the bowl, then add a good pinch of sea salt and black pepper.

on_enter.say: Crack the egg into the bowl, then add a good pinch of sea salt and black pepper.

steps.descr: With clean hands, scrunch and mix everything up well
steps.instructions: With clean hands, scrunch and mix everything up well. Divide into 6 and pat and mould each piece into a roundish shape, roughly 2cm thick.

on_enter.say: With clean hands, scrunch and mix everything up well. Divide into 6 and pat and mould each piece into a roundish shape, roughly 2cm thick.

steps.descr: Place the burgers onto a plate, drizzle with oil, then...
steps.instructions: Place the burgers onto a plate, drizzle with oil, then cover and place in the fridge until needed – this will help to firm them up.

on_enter.say: Place the burgers onto a plate, drizzle with oil, then cover and place in the fridge until needed – this will help to firm them up.

steps.descr: To cook the burgers, preheat a large griddle or frying...
steps.instructions: To cook the burgers, preheat a large griddle or frying pan for 4 minutes on a high heat, then turn the heat down to medium.

on_enter.say: To cook the burgers, preheat a large griddle or frying pan for 4 minutes on a high heat, then turn the heat down to medium.

steps.descr: Place the burgers on the griddle or into the pan, then...
steps.instructions: Place the burgers on the griddle or into the pan, then use a spatula to lightly press them down, making sure the burger is in full contact with the pan.

on_enter.say: Place the burgers on the griddle or into the pan, then use a spatula to lightly press them down, making sure the burger is in full contact with the pan.

steps.descr: Cook the burgers for 3 or 4 minutes on each side,...
steps.instructions: Cook the burgers for 3 or 4 minutes on each side, depending on how you like them – you may need to work in batches.

on_enter.say: Cook the burgers for 3 or 4 minutes on each side, depending on how you like them – you may need to work in batches.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, wash and dry a few small lettuce leaves,...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, wash and dry a few small lettuce leaves, tearing up the larger ones. Slice the tomatoes, peel and finely slice the red onion, then slice the gherkins lengthways as finely as you can.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, wash and dry a few small lettuce leaves, tearing up the larger ones. Slice the tomatoes, peel and finely slice the red onion, then slice the gherkins lengthways as finely as you can.

steps.descr: Place all the veg toppings, and the cheese (if using) on...
steps.instructions: Place all the veg toppings, and the cheese (if using) on a platter and put in the middle of the table with plates, cutlery, ketchup and drinks.

on_enter.say: Place all the veg toppings, and the cheese (if using) on a platter and put in the middle of the table with plates, cutlery, ketchup and drinks.

steps.descr: Once cooked, remove the burgers to a plate and carefully...
steps.instructions: Once cooked, remove the burgers to a plate and carefully wipe the pan clean with a ball of kitchen paper.

on_enter.say: Once cooked, remove the burgers to a plate and carefully wipe the pan clean with a ball of kitchen paper.

steps.descr: Halve the burger buns and lightly toast them in the pan,...
steps.instructions: Halve the burger buns and lightly toast them in the pan, then serve up.

on_enter.say: Halve the burger buns and lightly toast them in the pan, then serve up.
